title: Ficus protensa
taxonomy: Ficus protensa is classified in the family Moraceae, which is a family of flowering plants commonly known as the fig or mulberry family. This classification places Ficus protensa within the order Rosales, which is a large order of flowering plants that also includes the rose and apple families. Within the Moraceae family, Ficus protensa is further classified in the genus Ficus, which includes a wide range of species commonly known as figs. The species Ficus protensa is native to Australia and is characterized by its unique leaf shape and growth habit. As a member of the Moraceae family, Ficus protensa is closely related to other species such as Ficus rubiginosa and Ficus carica.
